markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content quality, publishing blockers, and AEO reporting strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Publishing Blocker Cleared:** The new publishing workflow is ready for testing this Friday, unblocking \~15 pending blogs and restoring the weekly cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [**AEO Reporting Unlocked:** Check That's new dual-categorization feature enables internal reporting on niche topics without altering the public profile, directly addressing Jason's request for AEO/GEO metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
  - [**Data Integrity Audit:** A technical SEO audit is underway to resolve a data discrepancy between SEMrush and Looker (GA4/Search Console), ensuring accurate performance reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [**Content Quality Fixes:** GrowthX will provide its AI corpus to help Galileo fix content hallucinations (e.g., misstating product strengths as weaknesses) and spammy internal linking.](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality & Pipeline

  - [**Problem:** AI-generated content has quality issues requiring manual fixes.](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
      - [**Hallucinations:** Content misstates product strengths as weaknesses.](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
      - [**Spammy Linking:** Over-linking to the "State of Eval Engineering" report (4-5+ times/post).](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX will provide its AI corpus (artifacts) for Galileo to review and update, ensuring the AI uses the latest product info.](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [**Blocker:** The publishing queue has \~15 pending blogs (12 needing minor edits, 3 queued).](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Resolution:** The new publishing workflow is ready for testing this Friday. Carrie may test it sooner to expedite publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)

### Performance Reporting & Strategy

  - [**Problem:** A data discrepancy between SEMrush and Looker (GA4/Search Console) is delaying performance reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
      - [**Discrepancy:** SEMrush shows a traffic spike, while Looker shows dips.](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
      - [**Cause:** Suspected issue with Looker's data blending formulas.](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [**Resolution:** A technical SEO audit is underway to validate Looker's data integrity.](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [**New AEO Reporting Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
      - [**Context:** Jason is requesting more granular AEO/GEO performance metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
      - [**Solution:** A three-part metric system will be implemented.](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
        1.  [**Weighted Metric:** Broad performance data.](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
        2.  [**LLM Referral Traffic:** Secondary metric.](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
        3.  [**Core Prompt Weighted Metric:** Performance on a curated list of high-value prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
      - [**Execution:** Jackson and Carrie will co-create the "core prompt" list and tag them in Check That for tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)

### AEO Strategy & Syndication

  - [**Context:** AEO is a long-term strategy, not a quick fix, requiring consistent execution.](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [**Tactic:** Increase third-party content syndication (Reddit, YouTube, dev.to) to build referential citations.](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
  - [**Caution:** Do not duplicate content verbatim.](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This avoids SEO penalties and is less effective, as AI often cites unique third-party content over branded listicles.](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)

      - [Test the new publishing workflow by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
      - [Grant Jackson access to Check That.](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)
      - [Send the AEO/GEO performance update today.](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)
  - [**Jackson:**](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
      - [Review the AI corpus and suggest updates.](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [**Jackson & Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
      - [Co-create the "core prompt" list for the new weighted metric.](https://fathom.video/share/1vKM2bxg6cB5rPSX7eaKTYYq5nzdeE3M?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
